canonical_topic: GPU acceleration for Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) systems
exclude_terms: generic cryptography acceleration without homomorphic encryption
preferred_problem_types: mapping FHE primitives to GPU architectures
end-to-end FHE inference/training systems with substantial systems contribution
runtime/memory/scheduling optimizations for HE on accelerators
retrieval_hints: Prioritize papers whose title/abstract mention system, architecture, framework, runtime, accelerator, CUDA, or GPU kernels.
Prefer venues/sources that include systems, security, architecture, databases, or applied cryptography angles.
When a paper is about encrypted ML on GPU, keep it only if it contains substantial FHE systems design rather than merely reporting speedups.
Extract and highlight problem/method/limitations explicitly during summarization.
Capture whether code or artifact is released.
Look for works accelerating core FHE primitives, not just application-level benchmark reports.
seed_queries: BFV GPU NTT key switching CUDA
site:dl.acm.org fully homomorphic encryption GPU system
source_preferences: top security/cryptography venues with implementation papers
